findings.description: The knowledge file introduces a property table with a "型" (type) column listing `boolean` for `useHiddenEncryption`. The source never states the Java type explicitly — it only shows `useHiddenEncryption="true"` (デフォルト) and `useHiddenEncryption="false"` in XML comments and the component config example. The type `boolean` is an inference, not a fact from the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source comment: `useHiddenEncryption="true"で暗号化を行う。（デフォルト）` / `useHiddenEncryption="false"で暗号化を行わない。` — no type declaration present.

findings.description: PascalCase Nablarch framework class names `HttpResponse` and `HttpRequest` appear in both Action class code examples (doRW11AC0201, doRW11AC0301 method signatures) but are absent from the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: `public HttpResponse doRW11AC0201(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx)` and `public HttpResponse doRW11AC0301(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx)` — both appear in s1 source code examples.
